title: Warm up
content: The slide displays three visualizations associated with driving in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image shows a unique aspect of the driving experience in these cities.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces the presentation theme focused on China's development. It hints at exploring the changing landscape and urban evolution across various regions.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines an investigative session focusing on urban development. It emphasizes the examination of local features, development strategies, and their outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide presents a matching of cities to their development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide explores development strategies from the perspective of taxi drivers. It reiterates the focus on sustainable urban development, tourism, and technology integration.
